audit_result.proof_trace: Post-Fulu spec requires get_beacon_proposer_index to return proposer_lookahead[slot % SLOTS_PER_EPOCH]. All three gossip verification paths (data_column L688, blob L536, block L991) call get_beacon_proposer_indices instead, which always recomputes from active validators without reading proposer_lookahead, violating the cached-lookup requirement.
audit_result.attack_scenario: If proposer_lookahead and recomputed values diverge due to state inconsistencies in cheap_state_advance partial updates, different nodes may accept/reject the same block based on which code path executes, causing consensus splits.

PROP-56ad1eb2-inv-018.text: get_beacon_proposer_index must return proposer_lookahead[slot % SLOTS_PER_EPOCH], not recompute.
